mapper.sql: id, title, slug, category, tags_json, description, cover_url, image_url, content_level, status, source, submitter_user_id, submitter_name, audit_note, recommended, sort_order, view_count, like_count, reviewed_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted

sql.where:
deleted = 0 AND status = 'PUBLISHED'
AND content_level != 'R18'
AND ( title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR COALESCE(description, '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND category = #{category}
AND COALESCE(tags_json, '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{tag}, '%')

mapper.select:
SELECT FROM app_illustration_work
ORDER BY recommended DESC, sort_order ASC, created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT FROM app_illustration_work
ORDER BY recommended DESC, sort_order ASC, created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT FROM app_illustration_work WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM app_illustration_work WHERE slug = #{slug} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT FROM app_illustration_work WHERE slug = #{slug} AND deleted = 0 AND status = 'PUBLISHED'
AND content_level != 'R18'
LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE app_illustration_work SET title = #{title}, slug = #{slug}, category = #{category}, tags_json = #{tagsJson}, description = #{description}, cover_url = #{coverUrl}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, content_level = #{contentLevel}, status = #{status}, source = #{source}, submitter_user_id = #{submitterUserId}, submitter_name = #{submitterName}, audit_note = #{auditNote}, recommended = #{recommended}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, view_count = #{viewCount}, like_count = #{likeCount}, reviewed_at = #{reviewedAt}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

UPDATE app_illustration_work SET status = #{status}, audit_note = #{auditNote}, reviewed_at = CASE WHEN #{reviewed} THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ELSE reviewed_at END, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
